title: A kind of anti-theft system detecting high magnetic fields in stores
abstract: The invention related to a system (1) comprising of a sensor (3), a processor (4.1) and a control unit consisting of communication units (4.1) and a device carried by the attendant (5) that is used to prevent theft by removing the tags attached on the clothes with magnetic element (6) having high magnetic effect field inside the fitting cabinets of the clothing stores.
claims:
Claims 1. The invention related to a system (1) that prevents possible thefts in stores especially in fitting cabinets where clothes are tried on and it consists of; â¢ at least one sensor (3), â¢ at least one control unit (4.1) comprising of at least one processor (4.1) and at least one communication unit (4.2) 2. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one sensor (3) that measures the magnetic field and is located in the cabin opening (2.1) or in the store. 3. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one control unit (4) that contains the processor (4.1) and the communication unit (4.2) elements, where each data coming from the sensor (3) is stored and processed. 4. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one processor (4.1) that evaluates whether each magnetic field value coming from the sensor (3) is at the "predetermined threshold value" and enables the data to be transferred to at least one device (5) through the communication unit (4.2). 5. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one communication unit (4.2) that enables the transfer of the information contained in the processor (4.1) to the device (5) by at least one of the wired or wireless communication methods. 6. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one communication unit (4.2) that provides information transfer via Wi-Fi. 7. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one communication unit (4.2) that provides information transfer via LAN. 8. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one communication unit (4.2) that provides information transfer with GSM. 9. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one communication unit (4.2) that provides information transfer via blue tooth. 10.The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one communication unit (4.2) that provides information transfer via USB. 11. The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one communication unit (4.2) that provides information transfer via Ethernet. 12.The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and it comprises of at least one device (5) carried by the person in charge or in the store, where information is transferred from the control unit (4). 13.The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and the device (5) in question is a mobile phone. 14.The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and the device (5) in question is a landline phone. 15.The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and the device (5) in question is a computer. 16.The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and the device (5) in question is a tablet pc. 17.The invention is a system (1) according to Claim 1 and the device (5) in question is a remote control. 18.The operating method of the system (1) comprises of; â¢ The sensor (3) transmits the magnetic field value measured to the processor (4.2) (101) â¢ Review of the magnetic field value by the processor (4.1) and comparison of it according to â predetermined threshold valueâ. (102) 

 â¢ If it is found that the magnetic field value is higher than the predetermined threshold value, it sends an audio or visual notification to the device (5) through the communication unit (4.2) (103) 19.The operation method of the system (1) according to Claim and it comprises of; â¢ If the processor (4.1) finds the magnetic value is not higher than the predetermined threshold value, it continues to compare incoming magnetic field value (104)
